sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101742" key="sfri/gos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σφρῐ´γ-ος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n101742.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">full strength</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">σφρίγει βραχιόνων</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0252.tlg001:58" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hermipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">58</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
